message:
fix: use cancellable context in exec WebSocket to prevent goroutine and SPDY leaks (#3292) (#3308)

Replace context.Background() with a cancellable context in the pod exec
handler. When the WebSocket read loop exits (client disconnect, browser
tab close, network partition), the deferred execCancel() cancels the
exec stream context, which tears down the SPDY connection to the K8s
API server. This prevents leaked goroutines and file descriptors that
previously accumulated with each orphaned exec session.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
